# Workspace Instructions

- Build the physics learning app around a concept graph, not chapters.
- Keep pedagogy layered: ELI5, intuition, visuals, math toggle, quick check.
- Prefer small, scalable abstractions for simulations and progress tracking.
- Use Next.js App Router, Tailwind, Anime.js, and Three.js only when needed.
- Keep the first release limited to a small set of concepts.
